claims.text: In FY2023, Electric ASEAN 14 reduced Scope 1 and Scope 2 carbon emissions intensity.
claims.source_sentence: In FY2023, Electric ASEAN 14 reduced Scope 1 and Scope 2 carbon emissions intensity.

claims.text: In FY2023, Electric ASEAN 14 grew its renewables and solar capacity as part of its decarbonisation transition.

claims.text: In FY2023, Electric ASEAN 14 reduced lost-time injuries through occupational health and safety programmes.

claims.text: In FY2023, Electric ASEAN 14 cut NOx and particulate air quality emissions at its plants.

claims.text: In FY2023, Electric ASEAN 14 lowered water intensity through recycled water initiatives.

claims.text: In FY2023, Electric ASEAN 14 improved grid reliability and supply security.
